proposals.title: Product quality gap: The screen displays competence scores as abstract metri
proposals.lesson: Creative Director rated output as 'fail'. Key issue: The screen displays competence scores as abstract metrics with zero contextual narrative. A user sees "75%" but doesn't know if they're on track for their exam or falling behind. This breaks the emoti
proposals.reason: Product quality insights from CD reviews can improve future implementation prompts.

proposals.title: File duplication in code generation output
proposals.lesson: Code generation produced duplicate files: - `CompetenceLevel.ts` has 6 duplicate entries. Extraction pipeline needs deduplication.
proposals.reason: Recurring failure patterns should be captured to prevent repetition in future projects.
